title: INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS - 211info
text: DEVNW CORVALLIS INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers individual development accounts (IDAs) for homeownership and post-secondary education, small business, auto purchase/repair, retirement, debt repayment, and more. Program is designed to help develop long term savings habits to reach a large financial goal. 2525 SE Third Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Households with adjusted gross income no higher than 80% of Area Median Income and net worth no higher than $20,000 Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (541) 752-7220 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 752-7220 Main phone Corvallis (541) 752-5037 FAX Main phone (541) 752-7220 Corvallis Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call for more information or to make an appointment FEES: Annual membership is $75 which includes access to counseling, classes, and workshops, and IDA program. DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Marion, Linn, Benton, and Lane Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the second floor at the corner of 3rd Street and SW Madison Avenue. Services: Individual Development Accounts Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE RENTALS HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - LINN-BENTON-LINCOLN COUNTY HOME REPAIR PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES MONEY MANAGEMENT - FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DEVNW CORVALLIS
